/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/domino.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o domino  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libMagnumSdl2Application.a /usr/local/lib/libMagnum.so /usr/local/lib/libMagnumPrimitives.so /usr/local/lib/libMagnumShaders.so -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/local/lib/libMagnumMeshTools.so /usr/local/lib/libMagnumTrade.so /usr/local/lib/libCorradePluginManager.so /usr/local/lib/libMagnumGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/local/lib/libMagnum.so /usr/local/lib/libCorradeUtility.so -ldl
